name: openai-compatible-protocol
title: Support OpenAI-compatible protocol
description: Add openai-compatible protocol routing, provider and alias UI support, sync integration, usage logging, and tests.
creator: OpenCode
notes: Implemented openai-compatible protocol routing via /v1/chat/completions, added OpenCode sync/import provider support, extended usage logging and protocol UI labels, and verified with Go tests plus frontend build.

acceptance: openai-compatible providers and aliases can be selected in UI
proxy forwards chat completions to /chat/completions with bearer auth
chat completions usage is captured in traces
